notes: AdRoll uses dynamic CPM (cost per thousand impressions) pricing model. No specific dollar amounts listed for tiers on the pricing page. Minimum $5 daily spend and $10 daily budget required to launch campaigns. Ad credits provided as part of managed service packages. Multiple add-ons available (cross-channel attribution, social ads). ABM packages available with separate pricing structure (Request a Demo or Get Started). Social Ads is self-service only.

Metadata.io has no public pricing displayed on their website. All pricing is custom and requires contacting sales or booking a demo. The platform is entirely AI-agent driven, with AI being the foundation rather than an add-on feature. The company emphasizes agentic automation across bidding, targeting, creative generation, budget optimization, and performance analysis.

tiers.name: Starter

Two additional enterprise tiers (Concierge and Agency) require contacting sales. AI features are available starting from the Build plan. The page mentions an additional 'Agency' tier that also requires contacting sales.

Instapage does not display public pricing on their main pricing page. The page offers a 14-day free trial and prompts users to 'Try for free' or 'Get a demo' throughout. Pricing information requires contacting sales. The company emphasizes AI content generation capabilities as part of their platform features. No specific pricing tiers, monthly costs, or billing options are disclosed on this page.

tiers.name: Customer Data Pipeline (Connections)
key_features: Collect and unify real-time events with customer data
Govern data for quality and compliance

notes: Segment (owned by Twilio) does not publish specific pricing on their website. Customer Data Pipeline (Connections) has a 14-day free trial. Full Customer Data Platform plans require contacting sales. AI capabilities (Predictive, Generative, and Recommendation features) are included in CDP plans but add-ons like AI Predictions may require separate pricing. The page mentions 'Custom volume' billing and invoice-based payment for enterprise plans.

mParticle uses a value-based, consumption-based pricing model with universal credits. No public pricing tiers are displayed. Customers must contact sales for a quote and customized rate card. The more credits purchased upfront, the greater the discounts. The model includes unlimited Audiences, unlimited real-time products, no monthly event or user caps, and unlimited data inputs and destinations. Premium AI and analytics features are included with unlimited access.

free_tier.name: Free
free_tier.limitations: 250,000 monthly events, 5 JavaScript Transformations, 1 tracking plan, 10 team members, 10 Reverse ETL connections, Prod only workspace

notes: RudderStack uses a usage-based pricing model based on monthly events. The Free tier includes 250,000 monthly events forever. Starter tier is $220/month for 1 million monthly events. Growth and Enterprise tiers require custom quotes. Overage fees apply for exceeding event limits on paid plans. No AI features are mentioned on the pricing page.

free_tier.name: Developer

notes: Lytics uses a credit-based pricing model where customers pay for data ingestion and profile updates. Developer tier is free forever with 2M monthly credits. Growth tier starts at $500/month for additional 10M credits. Pricing calculator available on page. Additional credits can be purchased at $500 per 10M for Growth tier. Enterprise tier requires contacting sales. Bonus: 10M free credits when upgrading from Developer tier to paid package. Generative AI features (Copilot tools) are included in Growth and Enterprise tiers, not available in free Developer tier.

free_tier.name: Basic Reverse ETL
free_tier.limitations: Up to 2 active syncs, unlimited destination count, unlimited user seats

notes: Hightouch uses usage-based pricing model but specific pricing tiers and amounts are not publicly displayed on this pricing page. The page emphasizes 'Easy to predict pricing' and 'Only pay for what you use' with composable, usage-based pricing. Two product lines are mentioned: Agentic Marketing Platform and Composable CDP, both requiring demo/contact sales for pricing details. Free tier available for Basic Reverse ETL with limited syncs. AI features (AI Decisioning, Data Agents, Agentic Marketing Platform) are highlighted as core offerings. Enterprise features include dedicated support, custom SLAs, and advanced security.

free_tier.name: Free Plan

tiers.name: Standard
key_features: Access to SSH tunnels for encryption
Usage-based pricing for connections, transformations, and activations

tiers.name: Enterprise
key_features: Pick any cloud provider (GCP, AWS, Azure)

notes: Fivetran uses usage-based pricing with tiered cost curves. Pricing varies by product (Connections, Transformations, Activations). Connections have a $5 base charge for usage between 1 MAR and 1M MAR on Standard plan. All new connections include 14-day free trial. Transformations offer 5,000 free monthly model runs on all plans. Activations pricing based on MAR with separate cost curves. Annual contracts provide automatic discounts starting at 5% up to 22%. Enterprise License Agreements available with fixed annual pricing and no consumption limits. Professional services available separately.
